original_text:
### Campaign Headline ("YOU DESERVE MORE")
- Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
- **ALL CAPS, always.**
- The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
- Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
- Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
- Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

relations.note: The approved colorway and tinted-letter treatment apply to the same campaign headline typography.
The hero stack is the layout treatment for the same campaign headline.
The full copy lockup uses the defined campaign headline treatment.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).

rules.intent: Preserve the campaign headline's distinctive, exclusive typographic treatment.
rules.rule_text: The "YOU DESERVE MORE" campaign headline is set in Agenda; Agenda may be live digital text only for this headline. In email, use the Nunito Sans ExtraBold fallback. Set the headline in ALL CAPS, always.

quotes: The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color

rules.rule_text: In hero placements, stack the campaign headline as three left-aligned lines in this order: YOU / DESERVE / MORE.

rules.intent: Maintain the approved campaign headline and treatment-positioning lockup.
rules.rule_text: Use the full campaign lockup copy exactly as: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
